race.comment: UNION (4) well-bred Snitzel gelding returning for his second campaign. Showed plenty of early toe on debut when fifth to Music Time over 1000m at Canberra last February. Fitted with the two trials and finds a winnable contest. Hard to hold out. ANDARNA (7) Farnan filly resuming from a lengthy break. Kept safe in betting on debut with a disappointing sixth over 1000m at this track. Has impressed in her two latest trials and worth noting Tommy Berry retains the ride. Each-way. HEARTS AFFAIR (11) resumes. Found a fairly strong Maiden on debut with a battling eighth over 1100m at Warwick Farm last February. Looks to have developed further over the break judging by her two good trials. Top-three contender. HAMMERTIME (10) resuming. Slow into stride on debut with a struggling seventh over 1200m at Wyong last March . Wasn't pushed out in her two trials and worth thought from the draw.
